title: syzygium racemosum subsp. racemosum
intro: Syzygium racemosum subsp. racemosum, also known as the red rata or rata, is a flowering plant species native to Australia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, making it useful for treating various health issues. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting the immune system. In traditional herbal practices, Syzygium racemosum subsp. racemosum is prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to release its medicinal properties.
